name: combos
description: Model-ref indirection: one `combo/<name>` maps to several `provider/model` refs, chosen per call by strategy (fallback|round_robin). resolveCombo runs at the top of callForUser.
notes: v0.1 = CRUD + resolveCombo (fallback picks refs[0]; round_robin reads rotationIndex, advanced by internal.combos.bumpRotation). Error-fallback across the remaining refs depends on provider-pool 2.3 — not wired yet. callForUser's resolveModelRef also handles `agent/<id>` (agent's fixed model).
